title: Experienced Retail Property Development - PH&C
excerpt: PH&C draws on vast retail property development experience with some of the nation’s and region’s most demanding and successful retailers
contentHtml:
PH&C draws on vast experience from numerous projects with some of the nation’s and region’s most demanding and successful retailers, to include: AT&T, Burlington Coat Factory, Chic-Fil-A, CVS, Five Guys, Giant, Jersey Mike’s, Lidl US, Mattress Warehouse, Panda Express, PNC Bank, Ross, Safeway, ShopRite, Staples, Target, Verizon, Walgreens, Wawa, Wegman’s and many more.

PH&C has also worked with a variety developers and REITs to reposition older shopping centers by overhauling the design, renovating façade and interior spaces, and re-tenanting their properties.
contentText: PH&C draws on vast experience from numerous projects with some of the nation’s and region’s most demanding and successful retailers, to include: AT&T, Burlington Coat Factory, Chic-Fil-A, CVS, Five Guys, Giant, Jersey Mike’s, Lidl US, Mattress Warehouse, Panda Express, PNC Bank, Ross, Safeway, ShopRite, Staples, Target, Verizon, Walgreens, Wawa, Wegman’s and many more. PH&C has also worked with a variety developers and REITs to reposition older shopping centers by overhauling the design, renovating façade and interior spaces, and re-tenanting their properties.
